title: EduTrack AI Assistant
info_banner: The AI can answer questions about {{firstName}}'s learning progress, grades, and home activities. For sensitive matters (wellbeing, behaviour), use Ask a Teacher so {{pronoun}} teacher can respond personally.
greeting: Hi! I'm the EduTrack AI assistant. I can help you with your child's learning progress, suggest home activities, or explain assessment results. What would you like to know?
suggested_questions: What home activities should I do with {{firstName}}?
